locations.name: Victim's Apartment
locations.description: Daniel Ross's apartment where his body was found. The crime scene. Contains the kitchen, living room, and personal belongings.

investigable_objects.name: Kitchen
investigable_objects.description: The kitchen area. A knife block sits on the counter with one knife missing. The murder weapon was found in the kitchen sink.

investigable_objects.name: Living Room
investigable_objects.description: The main living area. Two wine glasses sit on the table beside an open wine bottle. A broken picture frame lies on the floor.

investigable_objects.name: Study Desk
investigable_objects.description: A wooden desk with scattered work papers and personal items. Faint smudges are visible on the surface.

investigable_objects.name: Victim's Phone
investigable_objects.description: Daniel's phone found on the table. Contains messages and call logs.

locations.name: Building Hallway
locations.description: The hallway of the apartment building. Security cameras and elevator access logs are available here.

investigable_objects.name: Hallway Floor
investigable_objects.description: The hallway floor near the apartment entrance. A faint shoe print is visible on the floor.

investigable_objects.name: Building Security System
investigable_objects.description: Security camera recordings and elevator access logs for the building. Could reveal movement through the premises.

investigable_objects.name: Maintenance Office
investigable_objects.description: The building maintenance office. Work logs, access records, and spare keys are stored here.

locations.name: Parking Lot
locations.description: The parking lot adjacent to the apartment building. A security camera covers the entrance and exit.

investigable_objects.name: Parking Lot Security Camera
investigable_objects.description: A security camera that records vehicles and people entering and leaving the parking area.

locations.name: Victim's Office
locations.description: Daniel Ross's office at his financial consulting firm. A structured workspace with a desk, filing cabinet, and several locked drawers.

investigable_objects.name: Office Desk
investigable_objects.description: A heavy oak desk with multiple drawers. One drawer is firmly locked, showing signs of frequent use.

investigable_objects.name: File Cabinet
investigable_objects.description: A locked file cabinet containing financial documents and client records.

investigable_objects.name: Bookshelf
investigable_objects.description: A large bookshelf covering most of the back wall. Books on finance, law, and consulting. Some sections look recently disturbed, as if something is hidden behind them.

investigable_objects.name: Desk Drawer
investigable_objects.description: A locked personal drawer in Daniel's desk. Requires a key to open. Likely contains private belongings.
